params.name: latitude
params.description: Latitude of the search center point

params.name: longitude
params.description: Longitude of the search center point

params.name: address
params.description: Street address or point of interest name to search near

params.name: starts
params.description: Parking start time in ISO 8601 format

params.name: ends
params.description: Parking end time in ISO 8601 format

params.name: radius
params.description: Search radius in miles (default 0.5)

params.name: vehicle_type
params.description: Type of vehicle

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order for results

items.docs: Search for available parking locations near a given address, coordinates, or point of interest. Returns a list of facilities with availability and pricing for the requested time period.

params.name: facility_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the parking facility

items.docs: Retrieve detailed information about a specific parking facility including address, amenities, operating hours, pricing, and directions.

params.name: facility_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the parking facility

params.name: starts
params.description: Start time for availability check in ISO 8601 format

params.name: ends
params.description: End time for availability check in ISO 8601 format

params.name: vehicle_type
params.description: Type of vehicle

items.docs: Check real-time availability for a specific parking facility during a given time period. Returns current capacity, available spaces, and pricing for the requested window.

params.name: facility_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the parking facility

params.name: starts
params.description: Start time for rate calculation in ISO 8601 format

params.name: ends
params.description: End time for rate calculation in ISO 8601 format

items.docs: Retrieve pricing rates for a specific parking facility. Returns hourly, daily, monthly, and event rates where available.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by reservation status

params.name: starts_after
params.description: Filter reservations starting after this date

params.name: starts_before
params.description: Filter reservations starting before this date

params.name: facility_id
params.description: Filter by facility ID

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

items.docs: Retrieve a list of parking reservations for the authenticated partner account. Supports filtering by status, date range, and facility.
Create a new parking reservation at a specific facility for a given time period. Returns a confirmation with a booking reference and barcode for facility entry.

params.name: reservation_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the reservation

items.docs: Retrieve details for a specific parking reservation by its ID.

params.name: reservation_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the reservation

items.docs: Cancel an existing parking reservation. Cancellation policies and refund eligibility depend on the facility's terms and the time of cancellation relative to the reservation start.
